title: Customer Success Manager
location: London (Camden) — hybrid, 3 days/week onsite at customer depots
must_haves: Comfortable with regular travel and early depot starts
Confidence working with data (no SQL required)
met_strengths: Exceeds 3+ yrs; strong ownership/self-direction as founding-era operator
Daily AI-tools user — builds AI agents with Claude Code (met strongly)
Data-confident (Amazon Alexa analyst, lifecycle analytics); no SQL required
hard_blockers_note: No hard blockers. Soft concerns: this is a true customer-success/account-management role (own portfolio, onboarding, renewals) — Ryan has community/user growth but no stated B2B account-management/renewal ownership; industrial-logistics (waste/construction) depot field-work domain is far from crypto/Web3 and from his brand/marketing core.
one_line_verdict: AI-native and ownership traits fit, but it is account-management/renewals field work in industrial logistics — a genuine pivot from his marketing/community strength, hence a stretch.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via YC/Work at a Startup; full description pulled. YC S26, team of 5. Direct apply via workatastartup.com (signup_job_id 93563).
